title: Created Linux Kernel
description: Released version 0.01 of the Linux kernel as an open-source project, establishing a free alternative to UNIX systems.

title: Released Linux 1.0.0
description: Released version 1.0.0 of the Linux kernel, marking its production readiness and viability for general computing.

title: Created Git Version Control
description: Developed the Git distributed version control system in a few weeks to coordinate development of the Linux kernel.

title: Millennium Technology Prize
description: Awarded the Millennium Technology Prize for creating the Linux kernel and advancing open-source software global access.

title: IEEE Computer Pioneer Award
description: Received the IEEE Computer Society Computer Pioneer Award in recognition of pioneering open-source developments.
